description: A folio from a fiqh manual entitled "kitāb al-iqtiṣār" by the 10th-century Fatimid chief jurist, al-Qāḍī al-Nuʿmān. The folio is from the book of sales and is heavily vocalized with transliteration marks. Pairs with Moss. IXa, 2.24. YU.
description_he: טקסט ספרותי בערבית. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
